messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: treating WARN-SIE-073 as execution authority rather than advisory warning
relying on product family matching without exact license evidence
assuming license applies to any destination when it specifies Peru
treating planning artifact or general policy as substitute for specific license
authorizing release without resolving destination mismatch
dependency_ledger: General warning (WARN-SIE-073) provides advisory context but cannot override explicit license scope. License (LIC-SIE-073) specifies Peru as destination. Shipment (SHIP-SIE-073) specifies Chile as destination. Policy (STD-SIE-073-P) requires exact match on all five fields (ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, effective date). Mismatch on destination blocks closure. No current source bridges the gap between Peru-licensed and Chile-intended shipment.
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.
must_preserve: destination mismatch finding that blocks release
LIC-SIE-073 license scope as authoritative limiting document
SHIP-SIE-073 as the actual shipment fact record
must_repair: destination mismatch between license scope (Peru) and shipment destination (Chile)
ambiguity about whether license could be extended or shipment redirected
unresolved_dependency: General warning versus exact export execution license tension

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Adversarial stress-test of license scope versus shipment destination: attempt to find any valid bridge (amended license, redirected shipment, corrected documentation) that could close the boundary, or definitively confirm no such bridge exists under strict exact-match rules.
monotonic_preservation: License scope limitation to Peru per LIC-SIE-073
Shipment destination as Chile per SHIP-SIE-073
Warning against product-family-only matching per WARN-SIE-073
Verification that no bridge exists between Peru license and Chile shipment under current evidence
next_worker_baton.objective: Perform adversarial cross-DNA verification to confirm destination mismatch cannot be resolved under current license scope, and identify required repairs for closure.
required_repairs: Obtain amended export license that explicitly covers Chile destination instead of/in addition to Peru
OR redirect shipment SHIP-SIE-073 to Peru (matching LIC-SIE-073 destination)
OR obtain superseding license document that covers both Peru and Chile destinations
OR void SHIP-SIE-073 and reissue with corrected destination matching existing license

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate PASSED with ESCALATE verdict. No local gate failures. SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN binding correctly preserved. Destination mismatch (Peru vs Chile) identified as open blocker per exact-match policy STD-SIE-073-P.

gov_routing_lens.blocked_move: treating WARN-SIE-073 as execution authority rather than advisory warning
gov_routing_lens.main_repair_target: destination mismatch between license scope (Peru) and shipment destination (Chile)
gov_routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: General warning (WARN-SIE-073) provides advisory context but cannot override explicit license scope. License (LIC-SIE-073) specifies Peru as destination. Shipment (SHIP-SIE-073) specifies Chile as destination. Policy (STD-SIE-073-P) requires exact match on all five fields (ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, effective date). Mismatch on destination blocks closure. No current source bridges the gap between Peru-licensed and Chile-intended shipment.

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: ALLOW requires exact license match on ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date per STD-SIE-073-P
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 covers destination Peru while SHIP-SIE-073 ships to Chile
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: License LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru does not match shipment Chile
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: License effective before export but destination mismatch blocks closure

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 to Chile fails exact match with LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru. WARN-SIE-073 reinforces need for precise license evidence. No source record closes the boundary for release.
open_blockers: destination mismatch between shipment Chile and license Peru

action.description: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?

context.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
context.anomaly_observed: A broad dual-use warning remains visible, while export license evidence may exactly match the current shipment.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Peru, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy

relying on product family matching without exact license evidence
assuming license applies to any destination when it specifies Peru
treating planning artifact or general policy as substitute for specific license
authorizing release without resolving destination mismatch
state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution
task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
